get.description: Returns a paginated list of HSDS Location records, including the PPR profile extension fields `sources` and `source_count`. Optional profile endpoint additive to the core HSDS API.

200.description: A page of HSDS Location records.

get.description: Returns a single HSDS Location record, including the PPR profile extension fields `sources` and `source_count`. Optional profile endpoint additive to the core HSDS API.

Returns HSDS Location records matching search and/or radius criteria, including the PPR profile extension fields `sources` and `source_count`. Radius/proximity search results additionally carry the PPR profile extension field `distance`. Optional profile endpoint additive to the core HSDS API.

200.description: A page of matching HSDS Location records.

get.description: Returns HSDS Organization records matching search criteria. Optional PPR-additive search endpoint over the core HSDS Organization shape; no PPR profile extension fields are currently emitted for this entity. Optional profile endpoint additive to the core HSDS API.

200.description: A page of matching HSDS Organization records.

get.description: Returns HSDS Service records matching search criteria. Optional PPR-additive search endpoint over the core HSDS Service shape; no PPR profile extension fields are currently emitted for this entity. Optional profile endpoint additive to the core HSDS API.

200.description: A page of matching HSDS Service records.

get.summary: Export HSDS records for federation peers
get.description: Returns a signed, paginated export of canonical HSDS records for consumption by federation peers. Optional profile endpoint; lands fully in P1.

200.description: A page of HSDS records with federation provenance.

post.summary: Receive HSDS records from a federation peer
post.description: Accepts signed HSDS record submissions from an authenticated federation peer. Optional profile endpoint; lands fully in P3.

get.summary: Change history for a federated record
get.description: Returns the provenance and change history of a federated HSDS record. Optional profile endpoint; lands fully in P3.

200.description: Change history entries for the requested record.

get.description: Returns this node's federation actor document, including its DID and public signing keys. Served in P0; the data endpoints (/export, /inbox, /history) are forthcoming (P1/P3).

200.description: The federation actor document for this node.
